reviews.review_description: This game is genuinely so fun! The mechanic where the monsters move on their own is actually awesome and I’ve never seen anyone like that in a gth game before. Also the pink gorilla at the shop with the flowercrown looks so coolio! I like how there’s fanart at the lobby and a cool tv that plays a funny video. The head of the staff on the shelf’s is very smart to add so we can know who’s mod or admin or etc. My favorite map in this game so far is caves. The map is so huge and the summon is so cool!! Honestly I hope this game gets popular and makes it to the big leagues.

I loved the idea of just comedy and horror combined together into a gtag fangame. As of now, there was NO games like this, but with ASGT, this was really fun! If you’re looking for a game to play, I highly recommend the game. It’s guaranteed to make you laugh or scream.
